summary: The reproduction clones the pinned vulnerable commit and confirms two serializer breakouts: comment data becomes an injected element on the default path, and processing-instruction data becomes an injected element even when requireWellFormed is requested.
expected_security_impact: Running the reproduction should emit EVOHUNT_COMMENT_BREAKOUT_CONFIRMED and EVOHUNT_PI_BREAKOUT_CONFIRMED after serializing attacker-controlled Comment and ProcessingInstruction data into XML that round-trips into injected nodes.
actual_observed_result: Running ./reproduction/run.sh cloned commit fda7cc313de30243fea35cada64e0bb12099c2a1, built the Docker image, mounted the checkout at /target-repo, and emitted both expected proof strings with serialized payloads showing injected markup.
verification_method: The helper requires /target-repo/lib/index.js directly, constructs DOM documents, mutates comment and processing-instruction data, serializes them, reparses the resulting XML, and verifies injected element counts and PI child-node sequence. The host run.sh greps for both proof strings and fails closed if either one is missing.

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository on the host, checks out the pinned vulnerable commit, and mounts that checkout into the container at /target-repo.
